command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3dWo49LZM7B1Gvy.e54432474310 --database S6kXiUs3wP8DTXUNAceZmN --execute 
ALTER TABLE clientes 
  CHANGE COLUMN `nome` `nomeCompleto` VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  CHANGE COLUMN `cpf_cnpj` `cpf` VARCHAR(20) NULL;

ALTER TABLE veiculos
  CHANGE COLUMN `cliente_id` `clienteId` INT NULL;

ALTER TABLE crm_interacoes
  CHANGE COLUMN `cliente_id` `clienteId` INT NULL,
  CHANGE COLUMN `usuario_nome` `usuarioNome` VARCHAR(100) NULL;

ALTER TABLE os_historico
  CHANGE COLUMN `os_id` `osId` INT NULL,
  CHANGE COLUMN `status_anterior` `statusAnterior` VARCHAR(50) NULL,
  CHANGE COLUMN `status_novo` `statusNovo` VARCHAR(50) NULL,
  CHANGE COLUMN `usuario_nome` `usuarioNome` VARCHAR(100) NULL;
